name: brila
description: Brila public-API skills: generate a published website from a Google Maps listing (live URL + Markdown), edit a site's sections, upload images, and build embeddable widgets.

interface.shortDescription: Generate & manage published websites from Google Maps listings
interface.longDescription: Skills from the makers of Brila, the AI-native website builder. Generate a published site from a Google Maps listing (live URL + Markdown), edit its sections, upload images, and build embeddable reviews widgets — via the Brila public API.
defaultPrompt: Generate a Brila site from this Google Maps link and give me the live URL + Markdown.
Build a reviews widget from my Brila site for my Shopify store.
